title: Mobile Navigation — Five Options
description: Interactive comparison of five mobile navigation patterns (bottom tab bar, hamburger drawer, expandable FAB menu, tab bar + more overflow, edge-swipe drawer) for the team to review and pick from.

artifact.purpose: Let the team compare five mobile navigation patterns interactively and cast a pick with rationale before the next release's nav is locked in.

data.source: Interaction-design knowledge, curated per-option for this app's decision (no external dataset)

interactions: tab strip switches which of the 5 patterns is shown
each phone mockup is a live, working rebuild of the pattern (tap/drag to open/close menus, switch active destination)
per-option 'Vote for this option' toggle, persisted to localStorage
'Copy vote summary' writes pick + rationale to the clipboard for sharing outside the artifact
local theme toggle for standalone viewing, independent of the engine's own dark/light toggle
sources: Team request: compare 5 mobile nav options interactively for a pick
